title: Kiub Marketing Site — landing pages
purpose: Marketing landing pages, hero sections, FAQs, waiting-list announcements, and onboarding promo for Kiub. Desktop and mobile.

sections.heading: Pages in this file
items: Playground (draft)
Magazine post and Medium-style example reference page used as inspiration.
Recall / Desktop
Main marketing landing page (desktop) for Kiub Recall. Hero, request early access, announcement bar, 'You're on the list' state, Slack callout, mobile screenshots, multiple group/section blocks.
Self Chat / Starred
Marketing pages around the Self Chat / Starred concept — mostly desktop hero variants.
Browser History / Desktop
Desktop landing variants A and B pitching the browsing-history feature, plus FAQ section.
Browser History / Mobile
Mobile landing variants A and B pitching browsing-history.
Onboarding promo / Desktop
Marketing onboarding pitch (desktop): 'Experience Kiub in less than 60 sec' — highlight + image + comment, widget note, Ask AI.
Onboarding promo / Mobile
Same onboarding promo on mobile, plus saved-item state.
LTD / Announcement
Lifetime-deal announcement page — 'Join 12,092 others', join-the-waiting-list CTA.
LTD / Wireframe (draft)
Wireframe for the LTD landing — Home and bento.me reference.
LTD / Inspiration (draft)
Reference / inspiration board for LTD design (frame 1, bento.me).
🗑️ Junk / DO NOT USE
Old wireframes — Wireframe-1, Wireframe-2, Wireframe-6. Not production.

not_in_file: Store-listing / promo cover images → see 'Cover images'
footer: Discoverable from Slack via the kiub-figma-index registry. Run: python3 ~/.openclaw/workspace/kiub-figma-index/scripts/find.py "your query"
